meta.description: VOK Legal Agency pairs Erbil-based legal expertise with proprietary AI systems to deliver faster, sharper, and more accountable legal services.

hero.title: Legal counsel, engineered for certainty.
hero.subtitle: VOK Legal Agency fuses veteran Kurdish and Iraqi legal practice with AI systems built in-house — turning weeks of legal work into hours, without cutting a single corner.

home.introTitle: A firm built the way modern law should be practiced
home.introBody: Every engagement at VOK is staffed by a licensed attorney and reinforced by our proprietary AI research and drafting stack — so you get institutional-grade rigor at the speed of software.
home.servicesTitle: Twenty-one services. One standard of rigor.
home.servicesSubtitle: From contract drafting to cross-border compliance, each service is delivered through the same AI-augmented workflow — reviewed, verified, and signed off by counsel.
home.process1Body: Our AI intake system classifies your matter, flags jurisdictional issues, and routes it to the right specialist within hours.
home.process2Body: Our models draft, benchmark, and stress-test documents against Iraqi commercial and labor law before a human ever sees them.
home.process3Body: A licensed attorney reviews every AI-generated output line by line — nothing leaves VOK without human sign-off.
home.process4Body: You receive final documents plus a living compliance record, monitored continuously for regulatory change.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to move faster on your next matter?
home.ctaSubtitle: Tell us what you're working on. We'll respond within one business day with a scoped plan and fixed quote.

servicesPage.title: Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Twenty-one AI-augmented legal services, each delivered end-to-end with licensed attorney oversight.

list.title: Legal Document Summarization
list.description: Condenses lengthy legal documents into clear, accurate summaries your team can act on quickly.

list.title: Legal Memo Summarization
list.description: Distills legal memoranda into concise briefs that highlight the key findings and recommendations.

list.title: Legal Document Formatting
list.description: Standardizes and formats legal documents into a consistent, professional structure ready for filing or signature.

list.title: Legal Data Extraction
list.description: Pulls key clauses, dates, parties, and figures out of legal documents into structured, usable data.

list.title: Legal Record Digitization
list.description: Converts paper-based legal records and archives into searchable, organized digital files.

list.title: Contract Risk Assessment
list.description: Flags risky clauses, unfavorable terms, and exposure points before a contract is signed.

list.title: Contract Clause Extraction
list.description: Automatically identifies and extracts key clauses across large contract sets for fast review.

list.title: Due Diligence Review
list.description: Reviews corporate, financial, and legal documents to surface liabilities and red flags.

list.title: Legal Draft Review
list.description: Reviews legal drafts for accuracy, consistency, and compliance before they're finalized.

list.title: NDA Generation
list.description: Generates tailored non-disclosure agreements in minutes, ready for review and signature.

list.title: Contract Generation
list.description: Drafts commercial and service contracts from your requirements, ready for attorney sign-off.

list.title: Legal PDF Processing & OCR
list.description: Extracts and processes text from scanned legal PDFs using AI-powered OCR.

list.title: Legal Translation Services
list.description: Certified legal translation across Arabic, English, and Kurdish Sorani with quality control.

list.title: Case Timeline Creation
list.description: Builds clear, chronological timelines of events for litigation and case preparation.

list.title: Witness Statement Analysis
list.description: Analyzes witness statements to identify inconsistencies, key facts, and supporting evidence.

list.title: Legal Argument Extraction
list.description: Extracts and organizes the core legal arguments from filings, briefs, and case records.

list.title: Deposition Summarization
list.description: Summarizes lengthy depositions into concise, easy-to-reference briefs.

list.title: Case Law Research
list.description: Searches case law and precedent to support your legal position with citation-backed results.

list.title: Legal Research Assistant
list.description: An AI research assistant that answers legal questions with sourced references across statutes and precedent.

list.title: Regulatory Compliance Monitoring
list.description: Continuously tracks regulatory changes relevant to your business and flags what applies to you.

list.title: Case File Organization
list.description: Organizes case files, evidence, and documents into a structured, easy-to-navigate system.

pricingPage.title: Pricing
pricingPage.subtitle: Transparent, fixed-fee plans built around how modern legal work actually happens.
pricingPage.note: All plans include licensed attorney review. Custom scopes available for enterprise and cross-border matters.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.description: For individuals and small teams who need reliable core legal support.

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.description: For growing businesses that need broader legal coverage on an ongoing basis.

tiers.name: Business
tiers.description: For companies that need full-scope legal and compliance coverage.

aboutPage.title: About VOK Legal Agency
aboutPage.subtitle: VOK Legal Agency is an AI-powered legal services company based in Erbil, Kurdistan Region, built around a professional team that works together to deliver fast, reliable legal support.
aboutPage.storyBody1: VOK Legal Agency is a professional, team-driven legal services company based in Erbil. We combine the judgment of licensed attorneys with an in-house AI system built specifically for legal work, so routine and complex matters alike move faster without losing accuracy.
aboutPage.storyBody2: Our team works collaboratively across every engagement — from AI-assisted drafting and research to final review — so clients always have a dedicated point of contact and a licensed attorney standing behind every deliverable.
aboutPage.value1Body: AI drafts and researches. A licensed attorney reviews and approves. No exceptions.
aboutPage.value2Body: You know the cost before we start. No surprise invoices, no billing by the hour.
aboutPage.value3Body: We work in Arabic, English, and Kurdish Sorani as a matter of course, not as an add-on.
aboutPage.value4Body: Attorneys, researchers, and our AI systems operate as a single collaborative team on every matter, from intake to delivery.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Answers to the questions we hear most from new clients.

items.question: Is my legal work actually reviewed by a human attorney?
items.answer: Yes. Every document, filing, and piece of advice that leaves VOK is reviewed and approved by a licensed attorney. AI accelerates drafting and research; it never replaces professional judgment.

items.question: Which jurisdictions do you practice in?
items.answer: We practice Iraqi federal law and Kurdistan Regional Government regulation, with experience supporting cross-border matters involving international counterparties.

items.question: How fast can you turn around a contract?
items.answer: Standard commercial contracts are typically drafted and reviewed within 48 hours. Complex M&A or regulatory matters are scoped individually.

items.question: Do you offer services in Kurdish and Arabic?
items.answer: Yes. VOK operates natively in Arabic, English, and Kurdish Sorani, including certified legal translation as one of our 21 core services.

items.question: How is pricing structured?
items.answer: Most engagements run on fixed monthly retainers or fixed per-matter fees, agreed before work begins. Enterprise and cross-border scopes are quoted individually.

items.question: What happens to my data and documents?
items.answer: All client documents are handled under strict confidentiality agreements and stored in accordance with data privacy best practices; our AI systems do not train on client data.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.subtitle: Tell us about your matter. A licensed attorney will respond within one business day.
contactPage.formSuccess: Message received. We'll respond within one business day.
contactPage.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
